label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at this question and see what the answer is. The question is: If a person enjoys arts, he or she may ___. The options are: (A) see things from different points of view (B) deal with problems worse than others (C) be difficult to communicate with others (D) prefer to stay at home rather than go out The passage discusses a British study that found people who enjoyed the arts from an early age had better jobs and higher salaries. It also explains that studying the arts helps develop reasoning, problem-solving, creative and critical thinking abilities. These skills are useful in real-life challenges. Furthermore, it mentions that the arts help people see beyond their own experiences and appreciate different perspectives. For example, looking at art from different artists like Michelangelo or Picasso shows different ways of seeing the world. Shakespeare's plays and Li Bai's poetry also offer insights into different aspects of human experience. The passage emphasizes that the arts help develop the ability to see things from many different points of view, which in turn helps with communication and cooperation with others. Now, looking at the options: - Option (A) says "see things from different points of view." This is directly supported by the passage, as it states that the arts help develop the ability to see things from many different points of view. - Option (B) says "deal with problems worse than others," which contradicts the passage, as it says the arts help with problem-solving. - Option (C) says "be
